name: Monomolecular Foil

effects.description: Can cut through most mundane materials with ease.

description: A razor-thin sword forged with advanced metallurgy, capable of slicing through armor and bone alike. Used by elite duelists and assassins.

artwork.caption: A slender foil with a mirror finish.

provenance: Inspired by D&D 5e 'Vorpal Sword', reimagined for science.
